current_suggestion.pitch: Your poker diet is heavy on GTO theory (GTO Wizard, GTO Lab, Alderman) but lighter on the live cash game and exploitative adjustment layer that separates theory from profit at real tables. Jonathan Fargo and the BRF crew focus specifically on live no-limit hold'em with a solver-informed but exploitative lens — how to adapt GTO principles to player pools that aren't playing GTO. Format is a mix of hand history breakdowns, solo analysis, and coaching content at a level of rigor that matches your existing channels without drifting into beginner material.

history: TEDx Talks – Russ Roberts (EconTalk host solo appearances)
EP Wealth Advisors (with Ben Felix-style rigor — try 'The Plain Bagel' instead)
Odyssey of the Mind (William MacAskill / 80,000 Hours)
